channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-12581] Slab object "Freechain corrupt" on client
item.description:
From a backtrace of a crashed node.

[167960.759257] INFO: Slab 0xffffd8487699eb80 objects=512 used=442 fp=0xffff91cd667ae428 flags=0x6fffff00000081
[167960.759260] INFO: Object 0xffff91cd667ae1a0 @offset=416 fp=0xffff000000000000
 
[167960.759266] Bytes b4 ffff91cd667ae190: f0 13 fe 80 cd 91 ff ff 98 14 fe 80 cd 91 ff ff ................
[167960.759277] Object ffff91cd667ae1a0: 00 00 00 00 00 00 ff ff ........
[167960.759283] CPU: 24 PID: 25390 Comm: pool Kdump: loaded Tainted: G B OE ------------ 3.10.0-957.21.3.el7.x86_64 #1
[167960.759285] Hardware name: HP ProLiant BL460c Gen9, BIOS I36 12/29/2018
[167960.759288] Call Trace:
[167960.759301] [<ffffffff99363107>] dump_stack+0x19/0x1b
[167960.759310] [<ffffffff98e18c51>] print_trailer+0x161/0x280
[167960.759315] [<ffffffff98e1987f>] on_freelist+0xff/0x270
[167960.759321] [<ffffffff9935f98f>] free_debug_processing+0xa7/0x253
[167960.759357] [<ffffffffc16a8965>] ? ll_xattr_set_3_11+0x605/0xa90 [lustre]
[167960.759362] [<ffffffff98dd64f5>] ? kvfree+0x35/0x40
[167960.759366] [<ffffffff98dd64f5>] ? kvfree+0x35/0x40
[167960.759371] [<ffffffff98e1bb70>] __slab_free+0x250/0x2f0
[167960.759377] [<ffffffff98e69828>] ? generic_setxattr+0x68/0x80
[167960.759381] [<ffffffff98e6a005>] ? __vfs_setxattr_noperm+0x65/0x1b0
[167960.759387] [<ffffffff98f2013e>] ? evm_inode_setxattr+0xe/0x10
[167960.759390] [<ffffffff98dd64f5>] ? kvfree+0x35/0x40
[167960.759395] [<ffffffff98e1c2d6>] kfree+0x106/0x140
[167960.759399] [<ffffffff98dd64f5>] kvfree+0x35/0x40
[167960.759403] [<ffffffff98e6a36b>] setxattr+0x15b/0x1e0
[167960.759408] [<ffffffff98e5327d>] ? putname+0x3d/0x60
[167960.759412] [<ffffffff98e54492>] ? user_path_at_empty+0x72/0xc0
[167960.759418] [<ffffffff98e448a8>] ? __sb_start_write+0x58/0x110
[167960.759423] [<ffffffff98e76c71>] ? do_utimes+0xf1/0x180
[167960.759428] [<ffffffff98e6a657>] SyS_setxattr+0xb7/0x100
[167960.759434] [<ffffffff99375ddb>] system_call_fastpath+0x22/0x27
[167964.710134] =============================================================================
[167964.710141] BUG kmalloc-8 (Tainted: G B OE ------------ ): Freechain corrupt
[167964.710143] -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
 
[167964.710148] INFO: Slab 0xffffd847f71be440 objects=512 used=510 fp=0xffff91ad86f910a0 flags=0x2fffff00000081
[167964.710151] INFO: Object 0xffff91ad86f910a8 @offset=168 fp=0xffff000000000000
 
[167964.710156] Bytes b4 ffff91ad86f91098: 30 29 78 f6 a2 91 ff ff a8 10 f9 86 ad 91 ff ff 0)x.............
[167964.710159] Object ffff91ad86f910a8: 00 00 00 00 00 00 ff ff ........
[167964.710164] CPU: 20 PID: 11480 Comm: ptlrpcd_00_00 Kdump: loaded Tainted: G B OE ------------ 3.10.0-957.21.3.el7.x86_64 #1
[167964.710167] Hardware name: HP ProLiant BL460c Gen9, BIOS I36 12/29/2018
[167964.710169] Call Trace:
[167964.710180] [<ffffffff99363107>] dump_stack+0x19/0x1b

[167964.710465] [<ffffffff98e1bb70>] __slab_free+0x250/0x2f0

[167964.710505] [<ffffffffc172e558>] brw_interpret+0x428/0xe70 [osc]

[167964.710687] [<ffffffffc14bb0a0>] ? ptlrpcd_check+0x5e0/0x5e0 [ptlrpc]

[167964.710696] [<ffffffff98cc1cd0>] ? insert_kthread_work+0x40/0x40
[167964.710702] [<ffffffff99375c37>] ret_from_fork_nospec_begin+0x21/0x21
[167964.710705] [<ffffffff98cc1cd0>] ? insert_kthread_work+0x40/0x40
[167966.447183] general protection fault: 0000 [#1] SMP 
[167966.470825] Modules linked in: nfsd osc(OE) mgc(OE) lustre(OE) lmv(OE) fld(OE) mdc(OE) fid(OE) lov(OE) cts ko2iblnd(OE) ptlrpc(OE) obdclass(OE) lnet(OE) rpcsec_gss_krb5 nfsv4 dns_resolver libcfs(OE) rdma_ucm(OE) ib_ucm(OE) rdma_cm(OE) iw_cm(OE) ib_ipoib(OE) ib_cm(OE) ib_umad(OE) mlx5_fpga_tools(OE) mlx5_ib(OE) ib_uverbs(OE) mlx5_core(OE) mlxfw(OE) mlx4_en(OE) ipt_REJECT nf_reject_ipv4 nf_log_ipv4 nf_log_common xt_LOG nf_conntrack_ipv4 nf_defrag_ipv4 xt_multiport xt_recent xt_conntrack nf_conntrack iptable_filter dm_mirror dm_region_hash dm_log dm_mod mlx4_ib(OE) ib_core(OE) sb_edac intel_powerclamp coretemp intel_rapl iosf_mbi kvm_intel kvm irqbypass crc32_pclmul crc32c_intel iTCO_wdt ghash_clmulni_intel iTCO_vendor_support aesni_intel lrw gf128mul glue_helper ablk_helper cryptd mlx4_core(OE) mgag200
[167966.818207] ttm drm_kms_helper syscopyarea sysfillrect sysimgblt fb_sys_fops drm mlx_compat(OE) drm_panel_orientation_quirks devlink ses enclosure hpwdt ioatdma pcspkr i2c_i801 lpc_ich ipmi_si pcc_cpufreq ipmi_devintf ipmi_msghandler acpi_power_meter wmi binfmt_misc knem(OE) auth_rpcgss ip_tables bridge stp llc xfs isci libsas qla3xxx e1000e igb i2c_algo_bit megaraid_sas aacraid aic79xx ata_piix mpt2sas raid_class mptspi scsi_transport_spi mptsas mptscsih mptbase arcmsr ahci libahci sata_nv sata_svw bnx2x libcrc32c bnx2 ext4 mbcache jbd2 sata_sil libata tg3 e1000 nfsv3 nfs_acl nfs lockd grace sunrpc fscache tun sd_mod crc_t10dif crct10dif_generic sg ixgbe crct10dif_pclmul crct10dif_common hpsa dca mdio ptp hpilo scsi_transport_sas pps_core [last unloaded: ipmi_msghandler]

[167967.219950] Hardware name: HP ProLiant BL460c Gen9, BIOS I36 12/29/2018

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Oleg Drokin (green@whamcloud.com) merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/36210/
Subject: LU-12581 osc: prevent use after free
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: b2_12
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 989471396fad89d774db26c6277bf01ff40ebe0e

Minh Diep (mdiep@whamcloud.com) uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/36210
Subject: LU-12581 osc: prevent use after free
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: b2_12
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 1554c62a5c4989b597105ee40086e102bec01b72

Oleg Drokin (green@whamcloud.com) merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/35601/
Subject: LU-12581 osc: prevent use after free
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 61c9f8797771c951ecd240981d7d97d5adc685e0

Bobi Jam (bobijam@hotmail.com) uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/35601
Subject: LU-12581 osc: prevent use after free

Branch: master
